entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `encrypted_payload` BLOB NOT NULL, `fingerprint` BLOB NOT NULL, `envelope_version` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at_epoch_millis` INTEGER NOT NULL, `capture_source` TEXT NOT NULL, `plaintext_byte_count` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_bookmarked` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_local_clipboard_items_fingerprint
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_local_clipboard_items_fingerprint` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`fingerprint`)

indices.name: index_local_clipboard_items_created_at_epoch_millis_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_local_clipboard_items_created_at_epoch_millis_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`created_at_epoch_millis`, `id`)

indices.name: index_local_clipboard_items_is_bookmarked_created_at_epoch_millis_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_local_clipboard_items_is_bookmarked_created_at_epoch_millis_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`is_bookmarked`, `created_at_epoch_millis`, `id`)
